nodes.label: Far Install Root
nodes.rationale: Default install location is %LOCALAPPDATA%\Programs\Far, holding far.exe and runtime/ sources and headers.

nodes.label: Far Install Manifest
nodes.rationale: install.json at %APPDATA%\Far records version 0.2.2, installRoot, farExe, clangExe, installedAt for sync and uninstall.

nodes.label: FAR_CLANG Environment Variable
nodes.rationale: User-level FAR_CLANG points the Far compiler toolchain at the discovered clang executable.

nodes.label: LLVM-MinGW (MartinStorsjo.LLVM-MinGW.UCRT)
nodes.rationale: Windows installer auto-installs clang via winget when not found on PATH.

nodes.label: far-lang VS Code Extension
nodes.rationale: VSIX far-lang-0.2.2 provides Far language support; installer builds via package-extension.bat if missing.

nodes.label: Stdlib Module Embedding
nodes.rationale: Embeds std/**/*.far sources as C string literals in far_stdlib_modules.cpp with lookupStdlibModuleSource and legacy import path normalization.

nodes.label: Legacy Stdlib Import Aliases
nodes.rationale: Maps core.*, io.*, net.*, sci.* prefixes and pack/secure aliases to canonical std.* module paths for backward compatibility.

nodes.label: Far IntelliSense Core API
nodes.rationale: Machine-readable API surface for VS Code extension: keywords, types, builtins, importPaths, modules, stdlibClasses, aggregateTypes.

nodes.label: Far TextMate Grammar
nodes.rationale: scopeName source.far defines syntax highlighting for comments, strings, imports, declarations, keywords, aggregate constructors, types, operators, slices.

nodes.label: far-dark.svg
nodes.rationale: Dark-theme Far logo: orange (#FF9F43) rounded square with dark (#1C1917) bold F letter, 24x24 viewBox.

nodes.label: far-light.svg
nodes.rationale: Light-theme Far logo: orange rounded square with white F letter for contrast on dark UI backgrounds.

nodes.label: far-file.png
nodes.rationale: Windows .far file association icon: orange squircle with centered white uppercase F in flat sans-serif style.

nodes.label: Far Brand Identity
nodes.rationale: Consistent orange (#FF9F43 / #FFA54F) squircle with white F used across VS Code themes and Windows file type registration.

nodes.label: Sandbox OK Result
nodes.rationale: Single-line ok output confirming Far filesystem sandbox test passed.
